dataset_name: Classic Crop Recommendation Benchmark (GitHub mirror of widely reused crop recommendation CSV)
license_or_usage_note: No explicit license in mirror repo; treat as benchmark mirror and cite original upstream when possible.
notes: 2200 rows, 22 crop labels. Strong quick-prototype baseline but geography is not Indonesia and provenance is mirror/benchmark rather than official field survey.

dataset_name: Crop recommendation (integrated multi-source + CTGAN synthetic expansion)
notes: 57000 rows. Adds crop duration, water source, soil type, season and humidity-like variables, but the record explicitly states the dataset was expanded with CTGAN, so use for augmentation/prototyping rather than ground-truth evaluation.

dataset_name: Crop Recommendation using Soil Properties and Weather Prediction Dataset
notes: 3867 rows. Best directly supervised dataset among downloaded files because it links soil nutrients and multiple weather features to crop labels. The downloadable CSV does not actually expose latitude/longitude despite the dataset description claiming coordinates.

dataset_name: EcoCrop crop requirement database (second trimmed table)
license_or_usage_note: Check upstream repository/FAO EcoCrop attribution expectations before redistribution.
notes: 634 crop records. Not a supervised crop-from-soil dataset, but very useful as a rule-based crop suitability knowledge base and for constraining candidate crops after ML scoring.

dataset_name: Soil physical and chemical properties by vegetation restoration type
notes: 109 rows after conversion. Strong vegetation-suitability style dataset because soil measurements are linked to vegetation restoration classes, but it is non-tropical and site-specific.

dataset_name: Tropical soil fertility data (soil chemistry table from spectral fertility dataset)
notes: 102 rows after conversion. Useful for tropical soil chemistry ranges (OM, CEC, pH, exP, exK), but no crop label.

dataset_name: Selected soil properties under different land-use systems
notes: 30 rows only. Small but useful for sanity checks on NPK/pH/EC across land-use and crop types.

dataset_name: ISRIC WoSIS Indonesia soil-property bundle (country-filtered from bbox extraction)
license_or_usage_note: Mixed per-record licences from contributing datasets; preserve attribution fields.
notes: Official Indonesia-first soil backbone. Final CSVs were filtered to country_name=Indonesia after bbox extraction. Strong for pH, N, P (sparse), texture, EC, organic carbon and CEC; potassium is effectively missing.

dataset_name: Indonesia PDSI climate stress bundle from Southeast Asia drought/flood dataset
notes: Useful Southeast Asia auxiliary climate-stress layer (PDSI) with 10 km Indonesia grid and national temporal series, but it does not directly provide temperature/rainfall/NPK.

dataset_name: Global crop training samples bundle for 17 crops (sample subset of global suitability study)
notes: Downloaded the manageable training-sample and validation subset, not the multi-GB full rasters. Combined training CSV has 564158 labelled points (species + coordinates) and is well suited for spatial joining with soil/climate covariates.

dataset_name: Global crop suitability rasters for 17 crops under present and future climates (full record)
license_or_usage_note: CC BY 4.0. Full current raster zip alone is ~3.33 GB, future scenarios ~1.8 GB each.
notes: Highly relevant label source for research-grade suitability modelling, but full rasters were not downloaded because of size; only training-sample subset was collected locally.

dataset_name: WorldClim 2.1 monthly temperature and precipitation normals (10 arc-min bundle)
license_or_usage_note: Use according to WorldClim citation and redistribution guidance.
notes: Practical climate backbone for prototype merge. Provides monthly climatology rasters, not observed crop labels.

dataset_name: ESA CCI Soil Moisture global bimonthly mean climatology bundle (2018-2023)
provider: Zenodo (derived from ESA CCI Soil Moisture COMBINED v09.1)
license_or_usage_note: CC BY 4.0 on Zenodo record; underlying ESA CCI source should also be cited.
notes: Useful for adding topsoil moisture climatology when local soil moisture measurements are absent. Raster-only, so spatial extraction is required.

dataset_name: GAEZ Data Viewer / crop suitability portal
license_or_usage_note: Official FAO/IIASA portal; practical extraction workflow is portal-driven and not trivial to batch within this run.
notes: Important official reference for land/crop suitability. Not downloaded here because the portal is better suited to selective interactive export than bulk scripted acquisition in this session.

dataset_name: Peta Kesesuaian Lahan untuk Tanaman Pertanian & Perkebunan Kutai Timur
provider: data.go.id / Kabupaten Kutai Timur / BBSLDP Kementan
license_or_usage_note: Official government portal entry marked Terbatas / Request Data.
notes: Official Indonesia land-suitability source with labels for rice and estate crops, but no direct downloadable resource was exposed publicly during this run.

dataset_name: Effect of Nitrogen, Phosphorus, and Potassium fertilizers on cocoa in Indonesia
license_or_usage_note: CC BY 4.0 for the paper file on Zenodo.
notes: Useful Indonesia-domain agronomic reference, but the Zenodo record exposes a paper file only; no tabular dataset was openly downloadable.
